name: Chocolate-Cinnamon Cake Roll
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Unbleached Flour (or 1 cup Cake Flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Line a jelly roll pan, measuring 15.5 x 10.5 x 1 inch, with aluminum foil or waxed paper and grease generously.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat the eggs on high speed until thick and lemon-colored, about 5 minutes. Pour into a larger mixing bowl.
4. Gradually add the sugar, beating until well combined.
5. Add the water and 1 tablespoon of coffee-flavored liqueur, beating on low speed.
6. Gradually mix in the flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt until just incorporated.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared jelly roll pan.
8. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Loosen the cake from the edges of the pan and invert onto a towel sprinkled with cocoa.
10. Carefully remove the foil. Trim off any stiff edges if necessary.
11. Roll the hot cake and towel tightly from the narrow end. Allow to cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes.
12. Unroll the cake and remove the towel.
13. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of liqueur over the cake, spread with cinnamon whipped cream.
14. Optionally sprinkle with cocoa before refrigerating until serving time.
Cinnamon Whipped Cream:
1. In a chilled bowl, beat all ingredients until stiff.
